data.four_set_effect: Opening a chest regenerates 30% Max HP over 5s.

circlet_of_logos.desc: A cloth garment worn at the forehead. Though soaked in sweat and covered in dust, it still beams with an adventurer's pride.
circlet_of_logos.title: Adventurer's Bandana

flower_of_life.desc: A resilient flower that survived the harsh environment of an ancient city. It is now proudly worn like a medal.
flower_of_life.title: Adventurer's Flower

goblet_of_eonothem.desc: The spoils of one of an adventurer's many expeditions. Though a little damaged, it is still an excellent find.
goblet_of_eonothem.title: Adventurer's Golden Goblet

plume_of_death.desc: The feather of an exotic bird rarely seen on this continent.
plume_of_death.title: Adventurer's Tail Feather

sands_of_eon.desc: It's easy to lose track of time when you're adventuring where the sun doesn't shine, whether that's the depths of the abyss or the ruins of a lost city.
sands_of_eon.title: Adventurer's Pocket Watch

list.desc: The ambitious adventurer came across this resilient flower in the depths of a gloomy ruin.</br>Moved by the sight of life sprouting in defiance of a lifeless land, he almost forgot about the treasures buried deep in the ruin.</br>After pausing to ponder it for a while, the adventurer plucked the flower, wore it as a brooch, and ventured forth into the darkness.</br>
list.title: Adventurer's Flower

list.desc: There is nothing special about this green bandana, save that the fabric is rather robust and highly absorbent.</br>Just like the bandana, its wearer was an unexceptional, ordinary person.</br>But countless secrets lie hidden in the stars high up above and the abyss deep down below.</br>All of these things are awaiting discovery by mere mortals.</br>
list.title: Adventurer's Bandana

list.desc: An old, golden goblet that the adventurer used to drink water. It is said that he found it in an old ruin.</br>The exterior is engraved with ancient symbols and inlaid with a faded gemstone.</br>Eventually, the adventurer bid farewell to the nomadic lifestyle.</br>This old, golden goblet was traded in for new, shiny Mora.</br>
list.title: Adventurer's Golden Goblet

list.desc: An adventurer once traveled through a forest in search of rare beasts never seen before.</br>As he tore his way recklessly through the foliage, the adventurer tripped on a tree root.</br>When he regained consciousness, he saw a girl so beautiful that he was willing to give up the adventurer's life to be with her.</br>Her appearance was surreal, with a cluster of feathers adorning her hair.</br>
list.title: Adventurer's Tail Feather

list.desc: A pocket watch that once belonged to an adventurer. It was crafted by a master watchmaker with simplicity and practicality in mind, aligning with the philosophy of the Adventurers' Guild.</br>The adventurer spent most of his days in darkness. The rhythmic sound of its moving hands was the only proof he had of the passage of time.</br>Long after he had grown accustomed to a normal life, having given up the adventurer lifestyle he once loved so dearly, </br>this forgotten pocket watch still sat quietly in the cabinet, waiting for its next adventure.</br>
list.title: Adventurer's Pocket Watch
